title: Central Heating Radiator/Towel Rail Blanking Plug & Air Vent Set 1/2" Thread
features: ½" Nickel Plated Air Vent Valve
Suitable for all ½" radiators and towel rails
description: Product Description Greened House Central Heating Radiator Blanking Plug & Air Vent 1/2" Product Description These ½" Radiator Blanking plugs and Air Vent valves are made from Nickel plated brass. They're high quality products which can be used on any radiator or towel rail with ½" pipe connections. The plugs are fitted with a rubber washer to ensure a quick easy fit giving the perfect seal every time. They Air Vent has a rotational plastic cover that you can rotate to ensure that when you bleed the radiator, the water can be directed aware from the wall and into a collection bowl. All of these plugs and valves are tested to 13 bar. What's Included? ½" Nickel Plated Blanking Plug ½" Nickel Plated Air Vent Valve Technical Information Adjustable direction air vent. Pressure tested to 13 bar. Suitable for all ½" radiators and towel rails. Additional information Brand Greened House Material Brass Country of origin China Finish Nickel
